name: Cranberry Ring Mold with Apple-Pecan Salad Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the gelatin according to package instructions using cold water.
2. In a large bowl, mix boiling water with cranberry sauce until well combined.
3. Add lemon juice and cold water to the cranberry mixture.
4. Stir in horseradish and liquid red pepper seasoning.
5. Fold in salt until fully incorporated.
6. Pour the mixture into prepared gelatin mold.
7. Refrigerate until set, then turn off the heat source.
